# datahub_schema_assertion (Resource)

**DataHub ❌ | DataHub Cloud ✅**

Creates and manages a DataHub schema assertion monitor on a dataset.

Schema assertions check that a dataset's columns match an expected set, catching unexpected schema drift. The resource owns the complete expected field list and the comparison `compatibility` mode.

## Compatibility

`EXACT_MATCH` requires the actual schema to equal the expected fields exactly. `SUPERSET` allows the actual schema to contain additional fields. `SUBSET` allows it to contain a subset.

## URN

DataHub generates a server-side UUID for each assertion. The `urn` and `id` attributes are populated after creation and are stable across updates. ImportState requires the full assertion URN (e.g. `urn:li:assertion:<uuid>`). Only NATIVE (author-as-code) assertions can be imported; ingested EXTERNAL or smart/AI INFERRED assertions are refused.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `compatibility` (String) Schema match mode: `EXACT_MATCH`, `SUPERSET`, or `SUBSET`.
- `entity_urn` (String) URN of the DataHub dataset this assertion monitors.
- `evaluation_cron` (String) Cron expression defining when DataHub evaluates this assertion.
- `evaluation_timezone` (String) Timezone for the evaluation cron schedule (e.g. `"UTC"`).
- `fields` (Attributes List) The expected columns, in order. The resource owns the complete list -- fields added to the dataset outside Terraform are evaluated against this set per the `compatibility` mode. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--fields))
- `mode` (String) Monitoring mode. `ACTIVE` enables scheduled evaluation. `PASSIVE` records results without scheduling.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Human-readable description of what this schema assertion checks.
- `executor_id` (String) ID of the remote executor pool to use for evaluation. Omit to use the default executor.
- `on_failure_actions` (List of String) Actions to take when the assertion fails (e.g. `["RAISE_INCIDENT"]`).
- `on_success_actions` (List of String) Actions to take when the assertion passes (e.g. `["RESOLVE_INCIDENT"]`).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `tags_all` (Set of String) Tag URNs attached by the provider's `defaults.tags`. While non-null, the provider owns the complete `globalTags` list on this entity: tags added outside Terraform show as drift here and are removed on the next apply. Null when `defaults.tags` is not configured and the provider has never written tags to this entity (existing and externally-applied tags are then left untouched).
- `urn` (String) Full DataHub URN for this assertion (e.g. `urn:li:assertion:<uuid>`).

<a id="nestedatt--fields"></a>
### Nested Schema for `fields`

Required:

- `path` (String) Column path (field name).
- `type` (String) DataHub standard type for the column: `STRING`, `NUMBER`, `BOOLEAN`, `DATE`, `TIME`, `BYTES`, `ENUM`, `FIXED`, `MAP`, `ARRAY`, `UNION`, `STRUCT`, or `NULL`.

Optional:

- `native_type` (String) Platform-native column type (e.g. `VARCHAR`, `INTEGER`).
